name: com.xxhq.htmltouitoolkit
description:
将HTML/CSS布局转换为Unity UI Toolkit的UXML/USS格式。
包含浏览器可视化转换工具、AI Prompt直接生成UXML/USS、以及编辑器资源路径后处理（Sprite Atlas集成）。

Convert HTML/CSS layouts into Unity UI Toolkit UXML/USS format.
Includes a browser-based visual conversion tool, AI-to-UXML direct generation via SKILL prompts, and editor asset path post-processing for Sprite Atlas integration.

samples.description:
示例场景演示了预先配置的index_optimized.html文件、精灵图集和UI ToolKit画布输出，将HTML转换为UXML和USS。

The example scenario demonstrates the output of the pre-configured index_optimized.html file, sprite atlas, and UI ToolKit canvas, converting HTML into UXML and USS.
